title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 168.023 - Contact hours included in professional development requirements for vocational-technical certification
text:
168.023.  Contact hours included in professional development requirements for vocational-technical certification. — Professional development requirements pursuant to section 168.021 for vocational-technical certification or successor certification shall include contact hours relating to the specific vocational-technical subject area for which the educator seeks certification.
(L. 2004 S.B. 968 and S.B. 969 § 2)
